text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, September 21. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that soldering custom sensors in the garage. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! That's a big step. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Putting together our grocery list. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Yum, that sounds delicious! How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
